exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your internship competition forward
items: Research and compile a list of 10-15 companies offering internships in your target field
Create a detailed skills inventory matching your abilities to internship requirements
Schedule informational interviews with 3 professionals currently working in your target industry
Set up a professional portfolio website or LinkedIn profile showcasing your academic projects and relevant coursework
Research and document the application requirements and deadlines for your top 5 target internships
Map out the internship application timeline and create a detailed submission calendar
